summary: Frontend testing completed for LEXA Lifestyle Hero redesign, Testimonials compact layout, Footer logo sizing, and Virtual Tour portal fix. All requested features verified and working correctly.

details: Fullscreen video background with fallback image loads correctly
Quote 'Where technology meets luxury' centered at bottom - PASS
No headings, CTAs, or buttons in hero - minimal design achieved
Hero dimensions: 1920x1080 (full viewport)
Video poster/fallback image URL: https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/...
Header fully visible at top of hero
LEXA logo present
Navigation links: SOLUTIONS, SERVICES, INTELLIGENCE, PACKAGES, BRANDS, PROJECTS, CATALOGUES, EXPERIENCE
Book Consultation button visible
Exactly 4 testimonial cards displayed in single row (desktop)
Compact design with star ratings, truncated quotes, author info
View All link present with arrow icon
data-testid attributes: testimonials-section, testimonial-card-0 through testimonial-card-3, view-all-testimonials
Header logo container: 144px x 56px
Footer logo container: 144px x 56px
Logo sizes match perfectly (both use lg:w-36 lg:h-14)
Virtual Tour CTA on /experience-centre page found
Begin Tour button opens viewer correctly
Virtual Tour uses createPortal to render in document.body - fixed positioning works
Navigation controls (prev/next/dots) functional
Zone information panel displays correctly
Close button works - returns to page

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested hero redesign features verified. Hero is now minimal with video + quote only. Testimonials compact 4-col layout working. Footer logo matches header. Virtual Tour portal fix verified on experience-centre page.
features_verified: Hero section shows fullscreen video background with 'Where technology meets luxury' quote only
Hero navigation bar fully visible and functional
Testimonials section shows exactly 4 cards in single row on desktop
Footer LEXA logo matches header logo size (144x56px)
Virtual Tour on /experience-centre opens correctly via portal
Hero video poster/fallback image loads correctly
